title: Credix - Rekt
relevance_summary: Admin privileges abuse leading to unbacked token minting and draining liquidity pools

prevention.rule: Block any tx that mints unbacked tokens after gaining BRIDGE role

red_flags: mintUnbackedTokens() called after gaining BRIDGE role
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that mints unbacked tokens after gaining BRIDGE role
summary: An attacker with compromised admin privileges used their BRIDGE role to mint unbacked tokens and drain liquidity pools, resulting in a $4.5 million loss. A guard could have blocked such transactions by monitoring for mintUnbackedTokens() calls after gaining BRIDGE role.
